data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The site uses a microservices architecture to allow independent deployment and scaling of features.
data.technical_spec: Each service runs a unique process and communicates through a well-defined API, typically using REST or gRPC.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Content Delivery Networks are leveraged to optimize content delivery for better performance and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Akamai, Fastly, and Amazon CloudFront are used to cache content closer to users.

data.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
data.description: Designed to provide a consistent experience across multiple devices.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design principles implemented using CSS3 and HTML5.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Load balancers distribute network or application traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) with auto-scaling on AWS to maintain efficient load distribution.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: Sophisticated pipelines for data aggregation and processing for recommendations and analytics.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka and Apache Flink are used for stream processing.
